task_completion.description: Register Diego Ramirez as a new civilian identity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OpenCAD Civilian module with a successfully created profile or registration form filled out for 'Diego Ramirez' with DOB '1993-08-22' and address '4710 Palomino Avenue'.

task_completion.description: Register the stolen Pegassi Zentorno linked to Diego Ramirez.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Add New Plate' form or registered vehicles list under Diego Ramirez's profile, displaying Plate 'DGR-2247', Make 'Pegassi', Model 'Zentorno', and Color 'Yellow' (or a yellow variant like 'Race Yellow').

task_completion.description: Create a 10-64 (Crime in Progress) dispatch call at Vinewood Boulevard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Dispatch console showing a new or active call with incident type '10-64' (or 'Crime in Progress'), street 'Vinewood Boulevard', and the narrative mentioning the armed carjacking and stolen Pegassi Zentorno.

task_completion.description: Issue a vehicle BOLO for the stolen Pegassi Zentorno.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the BOLO board or vehicle BOLO creation form in the Dispatch or MDT module, specifically listing plate 'DGR-2247' with the reason 'Stolen vehicle - armed carjacking'.

task_completion.description: Issue a $750 citation to Trevor Philips for Reckless Driving.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Police MDT module showing a citation form filled out or a success message for 'Trevor Philips' (spelled with one L), with the charge 'Reckless Driving' and a fine amount of '750'.

task_completion.description: Create a person BOLO for Franklin Clinton.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the BOLO board or person BOLO creation form listing 'Franklin Clinton' (Black male, 25) wanted for questioning in the armed carjacking.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the OpenCAD web interface rather than using terminal commands or direct SQL database injections.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenCAD interface (http://localhost) with form inputs, dropdown selections, and button clicks.

integrity.description: The agent must navigate between the appropriate modules (Civilian, Dispatch, Police MDT) to complete the distinct tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent in the 'Civilian' module for registrations, the 'Dispatch' module for the call and BOLOs, and the 'Police MDT' for the citation, identifiable by the UI headers or sidebars.

integrity.description: The agent must actually submit the forms to create the records, not just type text into the fields without saving.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for system-generated success messages (e.g., 'Civilian Created', 'Citation Issued') or the newly created records appearing in the system's active lists/tables (like the BOLO board or active calls list).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Diego Ramirez is a new civilian; the civilian registration form has a known bug where text can bleed between Name and DOB fields. Vehicle registration requires navigating to 'Add New Plate' from the civilian profile. The vehicle color dropdown uses descriptive names (e.g., 'Race Yellow'). The dispatch call must use incident type '10-64' (Crime in Progress). The citation must target 'Trevor Philips' (spelled with one L). The task requires cross-module navigation: Civilian module for registration, Dispatch console for call/BOLOs, and Police MDT for the citation.
